macro.title: Can mortgage rates survive hawkish Fed talk during inflation week?
macro.what: Markets watch monthly core inflation prints and conflict headlines as the 10-year holds near 4.60% and Fed tone stays hawkish.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: FHFA moves to drop ‘reputational harm’ from consideration in counterparty suspensions

housing.title: Higher home-care spending by states linked to greater aging-in-place outcomes
housing.what: Researchers examined state investments in home- and community-based services (HCBS) and associated changes in where older adults lived.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: NAR guidance clarifies office exclusive listings, MLS rules
housing.what: NAR guidance details office exclusive listings, pre marketing statuses, disclosures, and CCP rules requiring MLS entry within one business day.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: What the ROAD to Housing Act means for agents, homebuyers
housing.what: Bill provisions encourage more housing production, cut regulation, expand financing opportunities and increase access to homeownership.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Jim Dalrymple Joins Rocket as Principal of Industry Relations
housing.what: Rocket has hired Jim Dalrymple as principal of industry relations, a role focused on building relationships with MLSs, trade associations, brokerage leaders and technology partners across the housing industry
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: OpenAI, Anthropic Employees Could Buy Nearly One-Third of All Homes in San Francisco With IPO Earnings
housing.what: A new Redfin analysis takes a look at how much Bay Area real estate OpenAI and Anthropic employees could hypothetically purchase with their IPO earnings, in the wake of two massively valuable AI companies filing confidentially to go public
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: There Are Now Only 5 Major Metros Where A Typical Luxury Home Costs Less Than $1 Million
housing.what: The number of major metros where you can buy a luxury home for less than $1 million is down to five from eight last year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Real Brokerage and REMAX set Aug 14 merger votes
notables.what: Real and REMAX set Aug 14 votes, with a 10 for 1 consolidation and a $13.80 cash option plus $60M to $80M pool.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
